headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录286篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究207篇, 开源项目36篇, 模型发布31篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（63篇）。其中10%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ harry0703 /MoneyPrinterTurbo：利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

▸ nesquena /hermes-webui：Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!

▸ revfactory /harness：A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the

▸ FareedKhan-dev /train-llm-from-scratch：A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.

▸ supermemoryai /supermemory：Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.
text: 今日共收录286篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究207篇, 开源项目36篇, 模型发布31篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（63篇）。其中10%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
